series_metadata.series_title: Time Study Analysis for Refusal Orders of Staff Hearing Officers
series_metadata.series_description: Analysis is performed on Refusal Orders of staff hearings on various time frames for processing. This report presents the median day for various time frames during adjudication and percentage interval analysis by region.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from publish dtate of report. ; Electronic: 4 years from publish dtate of report
